metadata.summary: Metadata editor for MS Office documents

documentation:
# NoMETA

## What is NoMETA?

NoMETA is a library for editing MS Office documents metadata, it works with documents of Office >= 2007 and has been tested with docx, pptx, xlsx, vsdx and accdt files.

## License

NoMETA is released under the terms of the Apache license v2.0. See LICENSE for information.

## Getting started

NoMETA is available in [PyPI.org](https://pypi.org/), so the recommended method to install is `$ pip install nometa`. Otherwise, you can download the source code and run by yourself.

NoMETA has a command line interface (CLI) that you can run directly. However, only a subset of metadata can be edited by CLI. You can use the command `$ nometa -h` to learn how to execute NoMETA on CLI.

The code snippet below gives a sample of how to use NoMETA programmatically. For more details, read the [documentation](https://silverlayer.github.io/nometa/).

```python
>>> from nometa import Document, Core, App
>>> doc = Document("tests/resource/test.docx",Core,App)
>>> doc.core.creator
'Michael Myers'
>>> doc.core.creator = "Johnny Test"
>>> doc.save("test2.docx")
```

classes.name: nometa.properties.text.TextProperty

methods.name: nometa.properties.text.TextProperty.__init__
documentation:
Constructor

Args:
    tname: tag name in the XML file. Eg: dc:title 

Raises:
    TypeError

methods.name: nometa.properties.text.TextProperty.value
documentation: Get the string value of a property
Deal with string values. It reads and keeps all element value as string.

modules.name: nometa
documentation:
NoMETA is a library for editing MS Office documents metadata,
it works with documents of Office >= 2007 and has been tested with docx, pptx, xlsx, vsdx and accdt files.

classes.name: nometa.Document

methods.name: nometa.Document.__init__
documentation:
Open the specified document to handle its metadata.

Args:
    file (str | IO[bytes]): file path of document as string OR an in-memory buffer (`io.BytesIO`)
    cls_core (Type[Core]): type of `nometa.sheet.App` class or its subclasses
    cls_app (Type[App]): type of `nometa.sheet.Core` class or its subclasses

Raises:
    TypeError
    ValueError
    ValueError

methods.name: nometa.Document.app
documentation:
Get `App` sheet instance correponding to `docProps/app.xml` file.

Raises:
    NotImplementedError: throws when there is no `App` instance.

Returns:
    App: an instance of `nometa.sheet.App`

methods.name: nometa.Document.core
documentation:
Get `Core` sheet instance corresponding to `docProps/core.xml` file.

Returns:
    Core: an instance of `nometa.sheet.Core`

methods.name: nometa.Document.save
documentation:
Save the changes to the specified document in `outfile` parameter.

Args:
    outfile (str | IO[bytes]): file path (as string) to document or in memory buffer (`io.BytesIO`)

Raises:
    IOError: throws when input and output file path/buffer are the same
The Document class aggregates two sheets. One sheet represents the *docProps/app.xml* and the other one represents the *docProps/core.xml*

classes.name: nometa.properties.datetime.DatetimeProperty

methods.name: nometa.properties.datetime.DatetimeProperty.__init__
documentation:
Constructor

Args:
    tname: tag name in the XML file. Eg: dc:title 

Raises:
    TypeError

methods.name: nometa.properties.datetime.DatetimeProperty.value
documentation: Get a `datetime` instance in UTC
Deal with UTC-ISO formatted dates. It must be used only with ISO formatted dates, and always writes UTC time.

functions.name: nometa.properties.boolean._to_bool
documentation:
Convert string to boolean.

For these string values 'false','no','not','n','0' and '', it returns `False`. For any other value, it returns `True`.
For any numeric representation >= '1.0', it returns `True`. Otherwise, `False`.

classes.name: nometa.properties.boolean.BooleanProperty

methods.name: nometa.properties.boolean.BooleanProperty.__init__
documentation:
Constructor

Args:
    tname: tag name in the XML file. Eg: dc:title 

Raises:
    TypeError

methods.name: nometa.properties.boolean.BooleanProperty.value
documentation: Get the value of this property

Deal with boolean values. It can be used with any xml-tag data type, the assignment of value is determined as:

For these string values 'false','no','not','n','0' and '', it puts `False`. For any other value, it puts `True`.
    
For any numeric representation >= '1.0', it puts `True`. Otherwise, `False`.

modules.name: nometa.properties
documentation:
This subpackage deal with XML tags of diverse data type.
It contains classes to handle tags whose data type are: boolean, datetime, numeric and text.

classes.name: nometa.properties.Property

methods.name: nometa.properties.Property.tname
documentation: Get the official tag name of this property

methods.name: nometa.properties.Property.from_element
documentation:
Read an `_Element` and returns the corresponding property object

Args:
    tname (str): the official tag name in XML documents
    elem (etree._Element): a valid `etree._Element` instance

Raises:
    TypeError

Returns:
    Property: an instance of `Property` or its subclasses

methods.name: nometa.properties.Property._set_node_value
documentation:
Hook method to set the tag's value

Args:
    node (etree._Element): the node corresponding this XML tag

methods.name: nometa.properties.Property.to_element
documentation:
Write the value of this property to `elem` parameter

Args:
    elem (etree._Element): the target xml tree node

Raises:
    TypeError
Abstract class for dealing with xml nodes/tags

classes.name: nometa.properties.numeric.NumericProperty

methods.name: nometa.properties.numeric.NumericProperty.__init__
documentation:
Constructor

Args:
    tname: tag name in the XML file. Eg: dc:title 

Raises:
    TypeError

methods.name: nometa.properties.numeric.NumericProperty.value
documentation: Get the value of this property
Deal with numeric (integer or float) values. It must be used only in float or integer xml elements.

modules.name: nometa.sheet
documentation:
This module contains the main XML sheets of metadata.
You can extend the App and Core classes in order to add new properties.

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Sheet.pack
documentation:
Create the binary representation of `etree._Element`

Returns:
    bytes: `etree._Element` as bytes

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Sheet.to_element
documentation: persist changes in this instance to the `etree._Element`

methods.name: nometa.sheet.App.__init__
documentation:
Create an instance of `App` representing the `docProps/app.xml` sheet.

Args:
    raw (bytes): the `app.xml` sheet as binary

methods.name: nometa.sheet.App.template
documentation: The document's template. It's a read-only property.

methods.name: nometa.sheet.App.total_time
documentation: The work time (measured in minutes).

methods.name: nometa.sheet.App.application
documentation: The description name of application

methods.name: nometa.sheet.App.scale_crop
documentation:
Scale crop.

This element indicates the display mode of the document thumbnail.
Set this element to TRUE to enable scaling of the document thumbnail to the display. 
Set this element to FALSE to enable cropping of the document thumbnail to show only sections that fits the display.

methods.name: nometa.sheet.App.manager
documentation: Manager name

methods.name: nometa.sheet.App.company
documentation: Company name

methods.name: nometa.sheet.App.app_version
documentation: The application version. eg. 14.0000

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.__init__
documentation:
Create an instance of `Core` representing the `docProps/core.xml` sheet.

Args:
    raw (bytes): the `core.xml` sheet as binary

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.title
documentation: The title

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.subject
documentation: The subject

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.keywords
documentation:
The keywords.

It is not compliance with CT_Keywords complex type specification.
It's a simplified implementation that doesn't support multiple languages.

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.creator
documentation: The creator/author

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.description
documentation: The description

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.last_modified_by
documentation: The last person that modified the document

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.category
documentation: The category

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.revision
documentation: The revision

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.created
documentation: When the document was created

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.modified
documentation: When the document was modified

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.content_status
documentation: The content status, its value should be 'Draft', 'Reviewed' or 'Final'.

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.version
documentation: The version

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.identifier
documentation: The document's identifier. Only some documents apply it

methods.name: nometa.sheet.Core.last_printed
documentation: When the document was printed
